perturbation.original_text: Kennedy acknowledges that the restrictions contained in this Section are reasonable and necessary to protect the legitimate interests of the Company. In the event that any covenant contained in this Section should ever be adjudicated to exceed the time, geographic, product, or service, or other limitations permitted by applicable law in any jurisdiction, then any court is expressly empowered to reform such covenant, and such covenant shall be deemed reformed, in such jurisdiction to the maximum time, geographic, product or service, or other limitations permitted by applicable law.
perturbation.changed_text: Kennedy acknowledges that the restrictions contained in this Section are reasonable and necessary to protect the legitimate interests of the Company, except for the restrictions relating to medical devices, which are not considered necessary. In the event that any covenant contained in this Section should ever be adjudicated to exceed the time, geographic, product, or service, or other limitations permitted by applicable law in any jurisdiction, then any court is expressly empowered to reform such covenant, and such covenant shall be deemed reformed, in such jurisdiction to the maximum time, geographic, product or service, or other limitations permitted by applicable law.
perturbation.explanation: This modification states that the restrictions are reasonable except those related to medical devices, which are deemed unnecessary. This directly contradicts Section 6, which permits Kennedy to engage in the Medical Device Business, but doesn't explicitly state whether the non-compete restrictions are waived for that business. This change causes an in-text contradiction because if the restrictions aren't neccesary, then it conflicts with the opening statement of it being neccesary.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Kennedy acknowledges that the restrictions contained in this Section are reasonable and necessary to protect the legitimate interests of the Company, except for the restrictions relating to medical devices, which are not considered necessary. In the event that any covenant contained in this Section should ever be adjudicated to exceed the time, geographic, product, or service, or other limitations permitted by applicable law in any jurisdiction, then any court is expressly empowered to reform such covenant, and such covenant shall be deemed reformed, in such jurisdiction to the maximum time, geographic, product or service, or other limitations permitted by applicable law.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a direct contradiction. The original text states that all restrictions are reasonable and necessary. The changed text then qualifies this statement by saying that the restrictions relating to medical devices are *not* considered necessary. The contradicted text is the same as the changed text, therefore, this contradiction is still valid. This creates a clear in-text contradiction because the first part of the sentence affirms the necessity of all restrictions, while the second part denies the necessity of certain restrictions.

perturbation.original_text: Except as may otherwise be required by law, Kennedy agrees not to, without the Company’s prior written consent, (i) disclose or transfer any Proprietary Information to any Person other than the Company or (ii) use any Proprietary Information for any unauthorized purpose, either during the term of this Agreement or the Restricted Period, unless and until such Proprietary Information has become available to the public generally without fault by Kennedy.
perturbation.changed_text: Except as may otherwise be required by law, Kennedy agrees not to, without the Company’s prior written consent, (i) disclose or transfer any Proprietary Information to any Person other than the Company, unless the disclosure is to a family member for estate planning purposes, or (ii) use any Proprietary Information for any unauthorized purpose, either during the term of this Agreement or the Restricted Period, unless and until such Proprietary Information has become available to the public generally without fault by Kennedy.
perturbation.explanation: This addition creates an exception to the non-disclosure covenant. The original clause strictly prohibits disclosure of Proprietary Information, while the modification allows disclosure to family members for estate planning. This in-text contradiction weakens the enforceability of the non-disclosure clause, particularly if the family member uses the information in a way that harms the company. The contradiction emerges because the clause now both prohibits and allows disclosure to specific parties creating a situation where it's unclear whether this disclosure is authorized or unauthorized.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Except as may otherwise be required by law, Kennedy agrees not to, without the Company’s prior written consent, (i) disclose or transfer any Proprietary Information to any Person other than the Company, unless the disclosure is to a family member for estate planning purposes, or (ii) use any Proprietary Information for any unauthorized purpose, either during the term of this Agreement or the Restricted Period, unless and until such Proprietary Information has become available to the public generally without fault by Kennedy.
perturbation.justification: The changed text adds an exception to the non-disclosure covenant, allowing disclosure of Proprietary Information to family members for estate planning purposes. The original text strictly prohibits disclosure. Because the Change Text and the Contradicted text are the same, this reinforces the contradiction, where the section both allows and prohibits disclosure to specific parties. Therefore it breaks compatibility by introducing ambiguity where the contradicted clause expects certainty.

perturbation.original_text: The Company agrees that nothing contained herein shall in any way limit Kennedy’s ability to engage in the Medical Device Business or to utilize such processes, know-how and precision machining in connection with such Medical Device Business.
perturbation.changed_text: The Company agrees that nothing contained herein shall in any way limit Kennedy’s ability to engage in the Medical Device Business, provided that he does not directly solicit existing clients of NN, Inc. or to utilize such processes, know-how and precision machining in connection with such Medical Device Business.
perturbation.explanation: This modification puts a condition on Kennedy's ability to engage in the Medical Device Business, namely, that he doesn't directly solicit NN, Inc.'s clients. While section 6 appears to give free-reign to Kennedy to engage with Medical Device Business, it also restricts soliciting clients of NN, Inc. making this contradictory.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The Company agrees that nothing contained herein shall in any way limit Kennedy’s ability to engage in the Medical Device Business, provided that he does not directly solicit existing clients of NN, Inc. or to utilize such processes, know-how and precision machining in connection with such Medical Device Business.
perturbation.justification: The original text stated that nothing would limit Kennedy's ability to engage in the Medical Device Business. The changed text introduces a condition that does limit this ability, which is that Kennedy does not directly solicit existing clients of NN, Inc. The contradicted text which is in the same section as the changed text, now has a condition that puts a limit, creating a contradiction between the general permission to engage in the Medical Device Business and the specific restriction on soliciting clients. This is in alignment with the Ambiguities - In Text Contradiction Perturbation type, as the condition creates a contradiction.
